title: Kids Create Pack 5 Children's Christmas HB Pencils & Novelty Festive Erasers Set
features: IDEAL FESTIVE FUN: This pencil and eraser set has 5 Chrismassy themed pencils, from candy canes to Christmas baubles. Each is topped with Gingerbread, Santa, Christmas Tree, Penguin and Chirstmas Present erasers
GREAT STOCKING FILLER: Either as a pack or the individual pencils can be put into a Christmas Stocking.
MAKES A GREAT GIFT: These pencils are perfect for note taking, drawing, cards, letters and more. Pencils can easily be sharpened for smooth clean writing
HIGH QUALITY & SAFE: Christmas pencils are made of durable wood, sturdy and not easy to break. Erasers are smooth to touch with no bad smell. Each Pencil Size Approx: 183mm x 30mm. Suitable Ages 5+
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: This pack has fully recyclable packaging. Feel even better when spreading that Christmas joy!
description: Festive design children's pencils and erasers set. 5 HB pencils in assorted designs with Gingerbread, Santa, Christmas Tree, Penguin and Chirstmas Present erasers on top. These pencils are perfect for note taking, cards, letters and more. Pencils can easily be sharpened for smooth clean writing.
